'''鈭歴h-g-dh''' ('''shagadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintessentialize|quintessentialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintessentialize|quintessentialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-g-dh
|-
! Lemma
| shagadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadhithi|shagadhithi]] || [[word:shagadhiji|shagadhiji]] || [[word:shagadhishi|shagadhishi]] || [[word:shagadhi|shagadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagadhuthuth|shagadhuthuth]] || [[word:shagadhujuj|shagadhujuj]] || [[word:shagadhushush|shagadhushush]] || [[word:shagadh|shagadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagadhuthu|shagadhuthu]] || [[word:shagadhuju|shagadhuju]] || [[word:shagadhushu|shagadhushu]] || [[word:shagadhu|shagadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadhufuth|shagadhufuth]] || [[word:shagadhufuj|shagadhufuj]] || [[word:shagadhufush|shagadhufush]] || [[word:shagadhuf|shagadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadhethe|shagadhethe]] || [[word:shagadheje|shagadheje]] || [[word:shagadheshe|shagadheshe]] || [[word:shagadhe|shagadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagadhothoth|shagadhothoth]] || [[word:shagadhojoj|shagadhojoj]] || [[word:shagadhoshosh|shagadhoshosh]] || [[word:shagadh|shagadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagadhotho|shagadhotho]] || [[word:shagadhojo|shagadhojo]] || [[word:shagadhosho|shagadhosho]] || [[word:shagadho|shagadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadhofoth|shagadhofoth]] || [[word:shagadhofoj|shagadhofoj]] || [[word:shagadhofosh|shagadhofosh]] || [[word:shagadhof|shagadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadh忙th忙|shagadh忙th忙]] || [[word:shagadh忙j忙|shagadh忙j忙]] || [[word:shagadh忙sh忙|shagadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:shagadh忙|shagadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagadhathath|shagadhathath]] || [[word:shagadhajaj|shagadhajaj]] || [[word:shagadhashash|shagadhashash]] || [[word:shagadh|shagadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagadhatha|shagadhatha]] || [[word:shagadhaja|shagadhaja]] || [[word:shagadhasha|shagadhasha]] || [[word:shagadha|shagadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadhafath|shagadhafath]] || [[word:shagadhafaj|shagadhafaj]] || [[word:shagadhafash|shagadhafash]] || [[word:shagadhaf|shagadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shagadhasha|shagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadhasha|goshagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadhasha|gokishagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadhn眉sha|shagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhnkn眉sha|goshagadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhn眉sha|gokishagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadhsh毛sha|shagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadhnksh毛sha|goshagadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadhsh毛sha|gokishagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhrosha|shagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhnkrosha|goshagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhrosha|gokishagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhmusha|shagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhnkmusha|goshagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhmusha|gokishagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadhsherasha|shagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadhnksherasha|goshagadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadhsherasha|gokishagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadhngasha|shagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadhnkngasha|goshagadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadhngasha|gokishagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadhyasha|shagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadhnkyasha|goshagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadhyasha|gokishagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadhyamasha|shagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadhnkyamasha|goshagadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadhyamasha|gokishagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhn眉sh毛sha|shagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhnkn眉sh毛sha|goshagadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhn眉sh毛sha|gokishagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhn眉rosha|shagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhnkn眉rosha|goshagadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhn眉rosha|gokishagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhn眉musha|shagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhnkn眉musha|goshagadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhn眉musha|gokishagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhsh毛n眉sha|shagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhnksh毛n眉sha|goshagadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhsh毛n眉sha|gokishagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhsh毛rosha|shagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhnksh毛rosha|goshagadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhsh毛rosha|gokishagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhsh毛musha|shagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhnksh毛musha|goshagadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhsh毛musha|gokishagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhron眉sha|shagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhnkron眉sha|goshagadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhron眉sha|gokishagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhrosh毛sha|shagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhnkrosh毛sha|goshagadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhrosh毛sha|gokishagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhromusha|shagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhnkromusha|goshagadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhromusha|gokishagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhmun眉sha|shagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhnkmun眉sha|goshagadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhmun眉sha|gokishagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhmush毛sha|shagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhnkmush毛sha|goshagadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhmush毛sha|gokishagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhmurosha|shagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhnkmurosha|goshagadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhmurosha|gokishagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shagadh|shagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙g忙dh|sh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshagadh|hoshagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙g忙dh|hosh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshagadh|hohoshagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙g忙dh|hohosh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shagadh|n眉shagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙g忙dh|n眉sh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shagadh|n眉n眉shagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙g忙dh|n眉n眉sh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shagadh|n茂shagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙g忙dh|n茂sh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shagadh|n茂n茂shagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙g忙dh|n茂n茂sh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushagadh|lushagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙g忙dh|lush忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushagadh|lulushagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙g忙dh|lulush忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishagadh|lishagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙g忙dh|lish忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishagadh|lilishagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙g忙dh|lilish忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshagadh|koshagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙g忙dh|kosh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshagadh|kokoshagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙g忙dh|kokosh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshagadh|keshagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙g忙dh|kesh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshagadh|kekeshagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙g忙dh|kekesh忙g忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
